name: video-template-hyperframes-saas-product-promo-30s
title: HyperFrames: 30-Second SaaS Product Promo (Linear-style)

title_i18n.zh-CN: HyperFrames：30秒 SaaS 产品宣传片（Linear 风格）
title_i18n.zh-TW: HyperFrames：30秒 SaaS 產品宣傳片（Linear 風格）
title_i18n.ja: HyperFrames：30秒 SaaS プロダクトプロモ（Linear スタイル）
title_i18n.fr: HyperFrames : promo produit SaaS de 30 secondes (style Linear)
title_i18n.es: HyperFrames: promo de producto SaaS de 30 segundos (estilo Linear)
title_i18n.pt-BR: HyperFrames: promo de produto SaaS de 30 segundos (estilo Linear)
title_i18n.it: HyperFrames: promo prodotto SaaS da 30 secondi (stile Linear)
title_i18n.vi: HyperFrames: video quảng cáo sản phẩm SaaS 30 giây (phong cách Linear)
title_i18n.id: HyperFrames: promo produk SaaS 30 detik (gaya Linear)
title_i18n.ar: HyperFrames: فيديو ترويجي لمنتج SaaS مدته 30 ثانية (نمط Linear)
title_i18n.tr: HyperFrames: 30 saniyelik SaaS ürün tanıtımı (Linear tarzı)

description: A 30-second HyperFrames composition modelled on Linear/ClickUp-style product films — UI 3D reveals, beat-synced kinetic typography, animated UI screenshots, end-card with logo outro. Built from HF catalog blocks (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) plus shader transitions between scenes.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 30秒 HyperFrames 作品，采用 Linear/ClickUp 风格的产品展示效果——UI 3D 展示、节拍同步动态字体、动画 UI 截图、带 logo 退场的结束画面。由 HF 目录模块构建（ui-3d-reveal、app-showcase、logo-outro）并使用着色器场景过渡。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 30秒 HyperFrames 作品，採用 Linear/ClickUp 風格的產品展示效果——UI 3D 展示、節拍同步動態字體、動畫 UI 截圖、帶 logo 退場的結束畫面。由 HF 目錄模組建構（ui-3d-reveal、app-showcase、logo-outro）並使用著色器場景轉場。
description_i18n.ja: Linear/ClickUp スタイルのプロダクト映像を模した30秒の HyperFrames コンポジション——UI 3D リビール、ビート同期キネティックタイポグラフィ、アニメーション UI スクリーンショット、ロゴアウトロ付きエンドカード。HF カタログブロック（ui-3d-reveal、app-showcase、logo-outro）とシーン間シェーダートランジションで構築。
description_i18n.ko: Linear/ClickUp 스타일 제품 영상을 모델로 한 30초 HyperFrames 컴포지션——UI 3D 리빌, 비트 동기화 키네틱 타이포그래피, 애니메이션 UI 스크린샷, 로고 아웃트로가 포함된 엔드 카드. HF 카탈로그 블록(ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro)과 장면 전환 셰이더로 구성.
description_i18n.de: Eine 30-sekündige HyperFrames-Komposition im Stil von Linear/ClickUp-Produktfilmen – UI-3D-Reveals, beatsynchrone kinetische Typografie, animierte UI-Screenshots, Endkarte mit Logo-Outro. Erstellt aus HF-Katalogblöcken (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) plus Shader-Übergänge zwischen Szenen.
description_i18n.fr: Une composition HyperFrames de 30 secondes inspirée des films produits Linear/ClickUp — révélations UI 3D, typographie cinétique synchronisée au rythme, captures d'écran UI animées, carte de fin avec outro logo. Construit à partir de blocs du catalogue HF (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) avec transitions shader entre les scènes.
description_i18n.ru: 30-секундная композиция HyperFrames в стиле продуктовых видео Linear/ClickUp — 3D-раскрытия UI, кинетическая типографика в такт музыке, анимированные скриншоты UI, финальная заставка с аутро логотипа. Собрана из блоков каталога HF (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) с шейдерными переходами между сценами.
description_i18n.es: Una composición HyperFrames de 30 segundos basada en los vídeos de producto estilo Linear/ClickUp — revelaciones UI 3D, tipografía cinética sincronizada al ritmo, capturas de pantalla UI animadas, tarjeta final con outro de logo. Construida con bloques del catálogo HF (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) más transiciones shader entre escenas.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Uma composição HyperFrames de 30 segundos modelada nos filmes de produto estilo Linear/ClickUp — revelações UI 3D, tipografia cinética sincronizada ao ritmo, screenshots UI animados, cartão final com outro de logo. Construída com blocos do catálogo HF (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) mais transições shader entre cenas.
description_i18n.it: Una composizione HyperFrames da 30 secondi ispirata ai video prodotto in stile Linear/ClickUp — reveal UI 3D, tipografia cinetica sincronizzata al ritmo, screenshot UI animati, schermata finale con outro logo. Costruita con blocchi del catalogo HF (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) più transizioni shader tra le scene.
description_i18n.vi: Tác phẩm HyperFrames 30 giây theo phong cách video sản phẩm Linear/ClickUp — hiệu ứng UI 3D, typography động đồng bộ nhịp, ảnh chụp màn hình UI hoạt ảnh, màn hình kết với logo outro. Xây dựng từ các khối danh mục HF (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) cùng chuyển cảnh shader.
description_i18n.pl: 30-sekundowa kompozycja HyperFrames wzorowana na filmach produktowych w stylu Linear/ClickUp — ujawnienia UI 3D, kinetyczna typografia zsynchronizowana z rytmem, animowane zrzuty ekranu UI, końcowa plansza z outro logo. Zbudowana z bloków katalogu HF (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) oraz przejść shaderowych między scenami.
description_i18n.id: Komposisi HyperFrames 30 detik yang dimodelkan dari film produk gaya Linear/ClickUp — reveal UI 3D, tipografi kinetik sinkron beat, tangkapan layar UI animasi, kartu akhir dengan outro logo. Dibangun dari blok katalog HF (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) plus transisi shader antar adegan.
description_i18n.nl: Een 30-seconden HyperFrames-compositie gemodelleerd naar Linear/ClickUp-stijl productfilms — UI 3D-reveals, beat-gesynchroniseerde kinetische typografie, geanimeerde UI-screenshots, eindkaart met logo-outro. Gebouwd uit HF-catalogusblokken (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) plus shader-overgangen tussen scènes.
description_i18n.ar: تركيبة HyperFrames مدتها 30 ثانية مصممة على غرار أفلام المنتجات بنمط Linear/ClickUp — عروض UI ثلاثية الأبعاد، طباعة حركية متزامنة مع الإيقاع، لقطات شاشة UI متحركة، بطاقة نهائية مع خاتمة الشعار. مبنية من كتل كتالوج HF (ui-3d-reveal، app-showcase، logo-outro) مع انتقالات shader بين المشاهد.
description_i18n.tr: Linear/ClickUp tarzı ürün filmlerinden esinlenen 30 saniyelik HyperFrames kompozisyonu — UI 3D açılışları, ritimle senkronize kinetik tipografi, animasyonlu UI ekran görüntüleri, logo outro'lu bitiş kartı. HF katalog bloklarından (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) oluşturulmuş ve sahneler arası shader geçişleri içerir.
description_i18n.uk: 30-секундна композиція HyperFrames у стилі продуктових відео Linear/ClickUp — 3D-розкриття UI, кінетична типографіка синхронізована з ритмом, анімовані скріншоти UI, фінальна заставка з аутро логотипа. Побудована з блоків каталогу HF (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) із шейдерними переходами між сценами.
description_i18n.en: A 30-second HyperFrames composition modelled on Linear/ClickUp-style product films — UI 3D reveals, beat-synced kinetic typography, animated UI screenshots, end-card with logo outro. Built from HF catalog blocks (ui-3d-reveal, app-showcase, logo-outro) plus shader transitions between scenes.

query.en:
Build a 30-second HyperFrames product promo (1920×1080, 30fps) for a fictional SaaS app. Pull these catalog blocks first: `npx hyperframes add ui-3d-reveal`, `npx hyperframes add app-showcase`, `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`, `npx hyperframes add flash-through-white`, `npx hyperframes add chromatic-radial-split`.

Visual identity: cool slate canvas #0e1116, single electric accent #6cf3c0, off-white text #f5f7fa, secondary indigo #7da4ff used only on UI chrome. Display face: "General Sans" 120px; body "Inter" 24px; mono "JetBrains Mono" 18px on UI bits; tabular-nums on numbers.

Four scenes, each ~7s, separated by shader transitions:

Scene 1 (0–7s) HOOK — full-bleed quote-typography. Headline scales in from 0.9 over 0.6s ease expo.out, then a single mono kicker line below appears with a marker-sweep highlight (use the css-patterns marker pattern). Background: subtle grain-overlay block at 8% opacity.
Transition at 7.0s → flash-through-white, 0.4s.

Scene 2 (7.4–14.4s) PROBLEM — three pull-quotes from "users" in stacked Reddit-style cards using the `reddit-post` overlay block, staggered 280ms apart, each entering with x:-60→0 + opacity 0→1 ease power3.out 0.5s. Hold for 2s on the third card. Background still grain-overlay; soft #6cf3c0 radial glow at 6% behind the stack.
Transition at 14.4s → chromatic-radial-split, 0.5s.

Scene 3 (14.9–22.0s) SOLUTION — the `app-showcase` block (three floating phones / desktop hybrid) renders the product UI. Use ui-3d-reveal to fly in the central UI panel from z=-400 with a 0.7s ease expo.out, then stagger three feature pills (each "plan / track / ship") sliding in from the right over 1.6s. Animate one cursor click on the active pill at 19.5s.
Transition at 22.0s → flash-through-white, 0.3s.

Scene 4 (22.3–30s) END-CARD — `logo-outro` block: piece-by-piece wordmark assembly with bloom glow over 1.4s, then a single CTA line "try it · 14-day free" fades in at 25.5s, then hold. Final 1s of grain-overlay continues for texture.

Non-negotiables: all timelines `paused: true` registered to window.__timelines; entrance-only animations (no opacity-to-0 exits — transitions handle the cuts); root data-composition-id, data-width=1920, data-height=1080, data-duration=30; min font-size 60px on every headline; tabular-nums on any digit row. Run `npx hyperframes lint` and `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 10` before render. Output: `saas-product-promo-30s.mp4`.
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a 30-second HyperFrames product promo (1920×1080, 30fps) for a fictional SaaS app. Pull these catalog blocks first: `npx hyperframes add ui-3d-reveal`, `npx hyperframes add app-showcase`, `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`, `npx hyperframes add flash-through-white`, `npx hyperframes add chromatic-radial-split`.

Four scenes, each ~7s, separated by shader transitions:

Scene 1 (0–7s) HOOK — full-bleed quote-typography. Headline scales in from 0.9 over 0.6s ease expo.out, then a single mono kicker line below appears with a marker-sweep highlight (use the css-patterns marker pattern). Background: subtle grain-overlay block at 8% opacity.
Transition at 7.0s → flash-through-white, 0.4s.

Scene 2 (7.4–14.4s) PROBLEM — three pull-quotes from "users" in stacked Reddit-style cards using the `reddit-post` overlay block, staggered 280ms apart, each entering with x:-60→0 + opacity 0→1 ease power3.out 0.5s. Hold for 2s on the third card. Background still grain-overlay; soft #6cf3c0 radial glow at 6% behind the stack.
Transition at 14.4s → chromatic-radial-split, 0.5s.

Scene 3 (14.9–22.0s) SOLUTION — the `app-showcase` block (three floating phones / desktop hybrid) renders the product UI. Use ui-3d-reveal to fly in the central UI panel from z=-400 with a 0.7s ease expo.out, then stagger three feature pills (each "plan / track / ship") sliding in from the right over 1.6s. Animate one cursor click on the active pill at 19.5s.
Transition at 22.0s → flash-through-white, 0.3s.

Scene 4 (22.3–30s) END-CARD — `logo-outro` block: piece-by-piece wordmark assembly with bloom glow over 1.4s, then a single CTA line "try it · 14-day free" fades in at 25.5s, then hold. Final 1s of grain-overlay continues for texture.

Run `npx hyperframes lint` and `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 10` before render. Output: `saas-product-promo-30s.mp4`.
